title: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

notes:
[gold]Decipher Path — Progressive Multi-Stage Sequence:[/gold]

Choosing Decipher locks you into a series of escalating choices. Each time you choose to continue, you lose Max HP and upgrade cards, then face another decision. You can give up at any stage (except the last) to exit cleanly.

[gold]Costs per stage:[/gold]
• Initial choice: 3 Max HP, upgrade 1 random card
• After stage 1: 6 Max HP, upgrade 1 random card
• After stage 2: 12 Max HP, upgrade 1 random card
• After stage 3: 24 Max HP, upgrade 1 random card
• After stage 4: (Max HP - 1) Max HP, [gold]upgrade ALL cards[/gold] — Final choice, likely fatal
• After final: Event ends with the revelation that the Truth is simply "Air"

[gold]Smash Path:[/gold]
Smash the tablet immediately to heal {SmashHPGain} HP and exit the event.

[blue]Notes:[/blue] Each continue option shows a [red]will kill you[/red] warning if the cost would be fatal. The final decipher stage has a dramatic escalation from 24 Max HP to Max HP - 1, making it nearly impossible to survive (you need at least 2 Max HP). However, it upgrades your entire deck instead of just one random card, making it potentially worth the sacrifice.
